body:
Amara, hope you're having a solid week. I've been keeping an eye on a few deals in the climate infrastructure space and wanted to loop you in on one that feels particularly relevant to [Halfway Capital](orgs/halfway-capital)'s thesis. The company is an early-stage grid-edge intelligence platform out of Austin — they're doing some genuinely differentiated work on real-time load forecasting using on-device ML, and they're raising a seed round right now. I think there's a natural fit given your focus, and I'd love to get your read before we get too deep into our own diligence. Would you be open to a quick call this week or next?

— Leo
